rationale: Suite now exits 0 (AC #1 met), but two concerns: (a) 3 .svelte source files modified for color-contrast despite bead's explicit 'frontend route additions or component changes' out-of-scope rule; (b) retries:2 added to mask a pre-existing flake rather than fix it.

findings.summary: Frontend component files modified (text-gray color tweaks for WCAG) despite bead explicitly scoping out 'frontend route additions or component changes — only test files and fixtures change'. Pragmatic but violates stated scope.

retries: 2 added to absorb a 'pre-existing palette Ctrl+K keyboard-timing flake'. Masks a real flake instead of fixing it; AC #2 forbids skipping tests to make CI green and the spirit applies to retry-padding too.

Test count appears to be 190 (189 pass + 1 skipped) vs. the 196 baseline cited in the bead description. AC #2 requires net non-decreasing test count; likely lost during harness migration in earlier child beads, but worth confirming no tests were removed in this attempt.
Screenshot baselines refreshed (10 PNGs). Bead description called re-baselining a follow-up bead, but it was unavoidable here once the Go-server harness replaced bun preview; acceptable.
